name: MSF-007B "Astra Valkyrie"
description:
When you're testing the AI program and a suit has gotten its eye on you, what now?

Gonna keep it sort of hope you all are enjoying yourself on janitor and having a good day or you're relaxing after a stressful day. Love yall, not in a homo way, lmao.

I've also been getting back at drawing the characters I used to do for roleplay after long days of not doing it back in 2024.
creator: FNIX1
